display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Brenda finds love at the home of a clock collector, but when the heir to the house is found dead, Father Brown investigates the case.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A multi-million dollar racehorse goes missing, drawing Shade and Angie to the track in search of answers. However, they encounter complications along the way.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Sid falls for the heiress to a local brewery, only for her to be arrested for the murder of her father.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A sandfly bite lands Neville in the hospital, and despite being advised to rest, his detective instincts take over when a nurse takes her own life during a night shift.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Stroll on the Wild Side, Part 1: Yannick Bisson is Canada's Sherlock Holmes in the Victorian crime drama. Murdoch meets former lover Anna. Lisa Faulkner guest stars.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret tries to join an elite philanthropy club and must represent a former club employee accused of smuggling drugs. Todd goes undercover to help Margaret's case.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The excellent crime drama set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch teams up with Alexander Graham Bell when a ruthless inventor is killed by a rival.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the excellent crime drama series set in 19th century Toronto. A high stakes card game involving Dr Grace ends in death.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies after being picked from the audience to assist a magician in a stage trick.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick's latest efforts to apprehend Red John fail, while Teresa and the team hunt for a murderer after an unidentifiable body is discovered.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie gets a break in a long-unsolved kidnapping case that's haunted him, but runs into trouble when the abductee - now a young woman - refuses his help.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The team learns that a deli employee's murder is linked to a foreign criminal organization with the ability to cripple the world's financial markets.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a celebrated concert pianist is murdered one night in his studio, Catherine's friendship with the victim's family puts her in unexpected danger.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The excellent crime drama set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch teams up with Alexander Graham Bell when a ruthless inventor is killed by a rival.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the excellent crime drama series set in 19th century Toronto. A high stakes card game involving Dr Grace ends in death.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick's latest efforts to apprehend Red John fail, while Teresa and the team hunt for a murderer after an unidentifiable body is discovered.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie gets a break in a long-unsolved kidnapping case that's haunted him, but runs into trouble when the abductee - now a young woman - refuses his help.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies after being picked from the audience to assist a magician in a stage trick.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: An attempted murder sends Shade and Angie to the eclectic Toronto Islands to find the truth behind the dramatic story unfolding around them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a celebrated concert pianist is murdered one night in his studio, Catherine's friendship with the victim's family puts her in unexpected danger.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 1: The team investigates the murder of a water taxi driver at the same time as Neville receives an anonymous letter warning them a murder is due to take place.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing priest discovers that the latest production by the Kembleford Players is dramatic in more ways than one.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: An attempted murder sends Shade and Angie to the eclectic Toronto Islands to find the truth behind the dramatic story unfolding around them.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown investigates the poisoning of a former hangman, while romance is in the air for Mrs McCarthy.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Contestants face an elimination challenge, reinventing the judges' quick midweek dinner recipes. Under pressure with time ticking, execution mistakes send one cook home.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy has an issue.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Amelia goes the extra mile. Sonny needs money fast. Mackenzie uses work as a distraction.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Guides are on a tour of Great Britain taking in buzzing London, the English countryside and the wilds of Scotland and Edinburgh.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and the rest of his class decide to teach Mrs. Krabappel a lesson when she confiscates their cell phones. S21 E2

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that his mother won't attend his wedding unless he invites his older brother, Georgie, he and Leonard travel to Texas to end their family feud. S11 E23

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John scrambles for donations. Jo and Lacey demand the truth. David faces his trauma.

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: This week celebs take on 'Couple Goals’, a fake love themed show hosted by Matt & Emma Willis, who are totally in on the whole thing and even get set their own jaw dropping mission in a hot tub!

programme.title: Thirst Trap: The Fame, The Fantasy, The Fallout
programme.desc: A young man's single TikTok post unexpectedly launches him to social media stardom, creating a devoted following that tests the limits between online celebrity and real-world relationships.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg delivers angry appraisals from his comfy throne, as Ed Gamble dons a baby's bonnet, and Katy Wix makes Alex wince. Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E8

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child. S12 E16

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple's scheme for money and desire doesn't turn out exactly as they had planned. S9 E10

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty goes head to head with the District Attorney for access over a key witness. Hewers and Shayes law firm is interviewing new associates. S3 E5

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When Amy throws a party to prove how great she's doing post-divorce, she's forced to enlist Dina and Jonah's help, and Dina ends up making the ultimate sacrifice. S3 E9

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz is on a mission to build a massive slippy slide; he tries to catch fish on a surfcasting adventure; and has Buzz got what it takes to become an amazing kaitaki fire fighter!?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Masterchef Australia Judge Andy Allen, alongside Michael Weldon and Courtney Roulston take you on a food journey to find the freshest produce and create inspiring recipes in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John scrambles for donations. Jo and Lacey demand the truth. David faces his trauma.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's on his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest-priced item at his next auction, but the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has learnt to expect the unexpected over the years, so it's not a surprise when Call the Midwife star Cliff Parisi drops off his Bedford CA campervan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Vauxhall Victor FB / Volvo Amazon VB: Derek picks up a five-vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors, and Paul collects a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache as they also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a child's tricycle from the 1960s while catching up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's on his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest-priced item at his next auction, but the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has learnt to expect the unexpected over the years, so it's not a surprise when Call the Midwife star Cliff Parisi drops off his Bedford CA campervan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Vauxhall Victor FB / Volvo Amazon VB: Derek picks up a five-vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors, and Paul collects a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Newport, where he learns about the heroism of a young boy who was awarded the Albert Medal.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Allied forces stumble across a sprawling complex in the French countryside. What did the Nazis have planned for this mysterious Nazi stronghold.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Scientists in Kamienna Gora work to keep the Luftwaffe flying but are they also building Hitler's next revenge weapon.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Allied forces stumble across a sprawling complex in the French countryside. What did the Nazis have planned for this mysterious Nazi stronghold.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Scientists in Kamienna Gora work to keep the Luftwaffe flying but are they also building Hitler's next revenge weapon.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Allied forces stumble across a sprawling complex in the French countryside. What did the Nazis have planned for this mysterious Nazi stronghold.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Scientists in Kamienna Gora work to keep the Luftwaffe flying but are they also building Hitler's next revenge weapon.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Allied forces stumble across a sprawling complex in the French countryside. What did the Nazis have planned for this mysterious Nazi stronghold.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A chilling discovery in the furthest reaches of Eastern Canada hints at the true depths of the Nazis' seafaring capabilities.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits Plymouth on the dramatic Devon coast to help save Neal and Tracy's sprawling holiday let and wannabe wedding venue with big ambitions - and even bigger problems.

programme.title: Dear Life
programme.desc: Mary finally admits her PTSD to Hamish. Andrew feels lost after his campaign. Lillian meets Ash’s lung recipient, but the visit turns hostile. S1 E5

programme.title: Alan Carr's Epic Gameshow
programme.desc: Alan Carr returns with a true classic - The Price Is Right. Eight players are invited to 'come on down' and guess if the price is right on a whole host of prizes.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Secrets Of Your Big Shop
programme.desc: Michael helps Liam and Lydia, who want to lose weight since having kids and find out the reason for their low moods, anxiety and bad skin. Plus: is beetroot nature's Viagra?

programme.title: First Crossings
programme.desc: Kevin and Jamie retrace the great journey of Thomas Brunner and his guide Kehu down the Buller River in 1846.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction, and the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads north to pick up a 1954 Morgan Plus 4 coupe in mint condition and believed to be just one of three still on the road.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon and Henry head to Worcestershire and meet TV props dealer Craig. In a first for the show Henry chooses a vintage ice cream van whilst Simon spots a grandfather clock with no clock.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by his uncle and nephew on a mission to try new activities in the great outdoors that include birdwatching and gliding.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Dragons' Den star Sara Davies takes Robson gorge-walking in Teesdale as the actor continues his mission to find new ways of spending time in the great outdoors.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An iron monster lost in the Alaskan tundra, a Crusader fort thrown into a modern conflict, and a prison built to house a mafia kingpin.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A real-life concrete jungle in America's 'Rust Belt', and an industrial facility that brought energy to a remote corner of the world.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days but he's still impressed.

programme.title: Churchill's Toy Shop
programme.desc: Documentary examining how Winston Churchill brought together a group of scientists and engineers to come up with ingenious secret weapons during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: Hear how the arrival of American forces and an Allied counter-offensive in 1918 helped defeat Germany. Tragically, 11,000 men were killed or injured on Armistice Day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit RAF Marham in Norfolk, where items include a gold cup and a Victorian book.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts are in Port Sunlight on the Wirral, where objects include a portrait of Shakespeare.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original, and the team also tackle a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction - after winning it, it is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Churchill's Toy Shop
programme.desc: Documentary examining how Winston Churchill brought together a group of scientists and engineers to come up with ingenious secret weapons during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: Hear how the arrival of American forces and an Allied counter-offensive in 1918 helped defeat Germany. Tragically, 11,000 men were killed or injured on Armistice Day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit RAF Marham in Norfolk, where items include a gold cup and a Victorian book.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Life in some of the many deserts and grasslands around the world, including in the Namib desert, where ostriches raise their family in the searing heat.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some very special working vehicles. Charlie feels the pull of a gargantuan Hummer and Paul extracts a vintage tractor from a Yorkshire barn.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Charlie picks up an iconic 60s motor - a Ford Cortina Deluxe - and a 1970s Morris van brings a taste of Carry On Camping to Pickering.

programme.title: To End all War: Oppenheimer and the Atomic Bomb
programme.desc: Documentary about physicist J Robert Oppenheimer, who built the weapon that changed the world, and his journey from ambitious scientist to a man tormented by the consequences o.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.
